productDisplayName: Highlander Men Classic Chinos Beige Trousers
description: Composition Medium beige trousers made of 100% cotton, has two front and two rear button-fastening pockets, and a zipper and button fly Fitting Classic Wash care Machine wash in cold water separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron This smart chino from highlander are an easy, throw-on-and-go style that will guarantee weekend cool. Pair it with a white linen shirt and suede boots, and revel in the comfort of the cotton fabric. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 41" Height: 6', Waist: 32"
